source.title: How to Dock/Undock Your Fleet in Sage
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How to Dock/Undock Your Fleet in Sage.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Docking and undocking your fleet in Starbased allows you to safely manage your assets, refuel, or prepare for your next mission.
How to Dock Your Fleet
Locate Your Fleet
Your fleets are shown at the bottom of your screen. If hidden, click “Hide/Show My Fleets Overview” on the middle right to view them.
Warp to a Starbase (If Needed)
If your fleet is not already at a Starbase, warp or subwarp your fleet to your chosen Starbase location.
Select “Dock”
Click on your fleet, then choose “Dock” to safely station your fleet at the Starbase.
Approve the Transaction
Confirm the docking transaction in your wallet.
How to Undock Your Fleet
Go to Your Docked Fleet
Locate your fleet at the Starbase where it is currently docked.
Select “Undock”
Click on your fleet, then choose “Undock” to send it back into space.
Approve the Transaction
Confirm the undocking transaction in your wallet.
